pseudoreplication_caveat: all lineages share one DES trajectory (heap, pools, decoder, reservations); McNemar p-values treat them as independent paired units and may be pseudoreplicated. Direction is persuasive; population-level inference awaits the multi-seed battery (see run note).
reading: delta=0 cell shows concentration produced no detectable net outcome advantage in that arm (14v17, balanced); the DiD (+34) shows the policy advantage appears almost entirely when quality differences exist. NOT full causal isolation: argmax at delta=0.3 also changes path identity, pool age dynamics, and draw keys; isolation would need a counterbalanced sticky-quality-blind comparator (round 4 wording).
